title: Knowledge Linked Event
description: Emitted when a knowledge record is linked to an entity (product plan, review, project, or improvement) in the knowledge_base system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

event_version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

source_version.description: Version of the source service that emitted the event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

region.description: Geographic or data-center region of origin.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge record being linked.

linked_entity_type.description: Type of the entity being linked to the knowledge entry.

linked_entity_id.description: Unique identifier of the entity being linked.

linked_by.description: Identifier of the user who created the link.

link_description.description: Description or reason for the link between the knowledge entry and the entity.

capability_name.description: Name of the capability that initiated the linking operation.

linked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the link was established.
